zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Chappis於1270年出生在英國戴文可洛福利時，她的父親Richard Chappis35歲，母親Jane Spynke16歲。她於大約1304年與Richard BOZON在英國戴文可洛福利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1327年在英國格盧斯特斯爾享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Chappis于1270年出生在英国戴文可洛福利时，她的父亲Richard Chappis35岁，母亲Jane Spynke16岁。她于大约1304年与Richard BOZON在英国戴文可洛福利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1327年在英国格盧斯特斯爾享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Chappis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: occupational name from Old French chapuis ‘carpenter, joiner’, a derivative of chapuiser ‘to cut’ (from Late Latin cappulare).

variants.name: Chappuis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Marcel, Veronique.

variants.name: Chaput
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Fernand, Lucien, Adrien, Alcid, Alphonse, Gaetan, Germaine, Girard, Jacques, Jean Marc.
variant of Chapu, a nickname for a habitual wearer of a distinctive cloak or hat, from a derivative of Old French chape ‘hooded cloak, cape, hood’, or ‘hat’ (from Late Latin capa).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Chappis was born in 1270, in Clovelly, Devon, England, her father, Richard Chappis, was 35 and her mother, Jane Spynke, was 16. She married Richard BOZON about 1304, in Clovelly, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1327, in Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Chappis est née en 1270, à Clovelly, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Richard Chappis, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Jane Spynke, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Richard BOZON environ 1304, à Clovelly, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1327, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Chappis 1270 in Clovelly, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Chappis 35 und ihre Mutter Jane Spynke 16. Sie hat um 1304 in Clovelly, Devon, England Richard BOZON geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1327 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Chappis è nata il nel 1270 nel Clovelly, Devon, England, sua padre, Richard Chappis, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Jane Spynke, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Richard BOZON circa 1304, nel Clovelly, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1327, nel Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Chappisが1270年にイギリスデボンクロベリーで生まれた時，父Richard Chappisは35歳，母Jane Spynkeは16歳であった。約1304年にイギリスデボンクロベリーでRichard BOZONと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1327年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Chappis(이)가 1270년 영국 데폰 클로브리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Chappis(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Spynke(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1304년 영국 데폰 클로브리에서 Richard BOZON(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1327년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Chappis nasceu em 1270, em Clovelly, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Chappis, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Jane Spynke, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard BOZON aproximadamente 1304, em Clovelly, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1327, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Chappis родилась в 1270 г. в местности клавелли, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Chappis было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Spynke, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard BOZON около 1304 г. в местности клавелли, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1327 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Chappis nació en 1270, en Clovelly, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Chappis, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Jane Spynke, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Richard BOZON aproximadamente 1304, en Clovelly, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1327, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años.
